title: Iran Calls Torpedoing of Ship by U.S. an ‘Atrocity’
summary_full: Iran’s foreign minister accused the United States of committing an “atrocity at sea,” after a U.S. Navy submarine attacked an Iranian frigate in the Indian Ocean.
summary_public: Iran’s foreign minister accused the United States of committing an “atrocity at sea,” after a U.S. Navy submarine attacked an Iranian frigate in the Indian Ocean.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran Calls Torpedoing of Ship by U.S. an ‘Atrocity’
